and other Chronic Headache - Medicare Only Claims NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicare data, for having Migraine and other Chronic Headache Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
null/missing
MOBIMP_COMBINED Mobility Impairments Indicator - Combined Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm
